Body.Content:
Custom Fields let you tailor your plans to match the way your team works. Add Text, Number, Date, Yes/No, and Choice fields to capture the information that matters most. View and update custom fields across Board, Grid, and Task details, with support for sorting, filtering, grouping, and bulk editing to keep your work organized and easy to manage.

GA date: October CY2026
